title: Lead SEO Specialist at Cars24 Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Cars24 Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Cars24 Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cars24 Holdings Services:
Cars24 Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24 Holdings Services!
